query:
INSERT INTO owners (id, name, phone, alt_phone, address, notes)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
        ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
            name = EXCLUDED.name,
            phone = EXCLUDED.phone,
            alt_phone = EXCLUDED.alt_phone,
            address = EXCLUDED.address,
            notes = EXCLUDED.notes,
            deleted_at = NULL
